chapter_title.ar: باب آخَرُ مِنْهُ فِي حِفْظِ الْمَالِ وَ كَرَاهَةِ الْإِضَاعَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 154 – Another chapter from it regarding protection of the wealth and abhorrence of the wastage

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/411)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/411)
text: سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ يُبْغِضُ الْقِيلَ وَ الْقَالَ وَ إِضَاعَةَ الْمَالِ وَ كَثْرَةَ السُّؤَالِ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Al Washa,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I heard him<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Hates ‘الْقِيلَ وَ الْقَالَ’ (the ‘It was said such’, and ‘he said such’, i.e., useless discussions and arguments), and wastage of the wealth, and abundant questioning’.
en.sarwar: 4. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ali ibn Asbat from certain persons of our people from ‘Amr ibn abu al-Miqdam who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘One’s trusting a treacherous person and wasting assets is a worthless act.’”
